Nothing (R)

Design

Light up the everyday

The complex made simple, light, great to look at, and even easier to use. Phone (3a) Lite is a signature Nothing design that's hard to put down.

Light up the everyday - The complex made simple, light, great to look at, and even easier to use. Phone (3a) Lite is a signature Nothing design that's hard to put down.

All glass. All class.

New high-grade tempered glass and precision-machined aluminium touches make a phone that packs power and posture.

All glass. All class. - New high-grade tempered glass and precision-machined aluminium touches make a phone that packs power and posture.

Officially tough

Rated IP54 in dust and water resistance, Phone (3a) Lite can handle it, from any direction.

Officially tough - Rated IP54 in dust and water resistance, Phone (3a) Lite can handle it, from any direction.

Camera

Load your shots with light

Get brighter colours and more precise details with a 0.6x to 10x zoom range.

Load your shots with light - Get brighter colours and more precise details with a 0.6x to 10x zoom range.

The camera system

The 50 MP Main camera is backed by an 8 MP ultra-wide camera, a 4 CM macro camera and a 16 MP front camera. The combination takes in 64% more light and broadens your horizon by 119.5%.

Take power shots

TrueLens Engine 4 uses advanced computational algorithms and AI for more powerful image processing.

Take power shots - TrueLens Engine 4 uses advanced computational algorithms and AI for more powerful image processing.

Perfect your photography eye

Create personal photography presets and save memories in the Nothing Gallery. Use built-in tools, intuitive controls and shoot modes to become a lens artist.

Perfect your photography eye - Create personal photography presets and save memories in the Nothing Gallery. Use built-in tools, intuitive controls and shoot modes to become a lens artist.

Essential

Essential, now even more essential

Save content, sparks of inspiration and ideas in Essential Key. Then, Essential Space will automatically organise and catalogue everything for you, creating personalised suggestions, summaries or action points. All with a little help from AI. Your data stays locked down Your content is securely stored locally on your device. When we send your captured content to the cloud for secure processing, your data is encrypted and automatically deleted once the task is complete.

Essential, now even more essential - Save content, sparks of inspiration and ideas in Essential Key. Then, Essential Space will automatically organise and catalogue everything for you, creating per

Essential Key

Press once to capture your screen, long-press to record voicenotes, and double-press to access Essential Space.

Essential Key - Press once to capture your screen, long-press to record voicenotes, and double-press to access Essential Space.

Essential Space

AI organises everything you capture and generates personalised suggestions and actions to help you stay on top of life.

Essential Space - AI organises everything you capture and generates personalised suggestions and actions to help you stay on top of life.

Essential Search

Find everything. Type keywords and get what you need immediately. Internet connection is not needed, so Essential Search is always there for you. Swipe up from the bottom of your screen to access it.

Essential Search - Find everything. Type keywords and get what you need immediately. Internet connection is not needed, so Essential Search is always there for you. Swipe up from

Nothing OS

Life runs easy on Nothing OS

Effortless. Intuitive. Customisable. Nothing OS is the purposeful and personal system that helps you make lite work of life.

Life runs easy on Nothing OS - Effortless. Intuitive. Customisable. Nothing OS is the purposeful and personal system that helps you make lite work of life.

Keep creating

Play with the Dot Engine to create bespoke animations, icons and fonts that bring a little you to the Nothing look.

Keep creating - Play with the Dot Engine to create bespoke animations, icons and fonts that bring a little you to the Nothing look.

Make every day effortless

Adjust Quick Settings, your home screen, and your lock screen, with custom shortcuts and widgets that make your phone work better for you.

Make every day effortless - Adjust Quick Settings, your home screen, and your lock screen, with custom shortcuts and widgets that make your phone work better for you.

Chat in your code

Send content straight to people's lock screens with creative shared widgets.

Chat in your code - Send content straight to people's lock screens with creative shared widgets.

Get your go-to apps quicker

Activate Smart Drawer and your apps will self-organise. Your most used will show at the top of the drawer, and beneath that, apps will organise by category.

Get your go-to apps quicker - Activate Smart Drawer and your apps will self-organise. Your most used will show at the top of the drawer, and beneath that, apps will organise by category.

Intelligence run on intelligence

Use ChatGPT on-the-go with voice prompts or with a bespoke Nothing Widget. This first-of-its-kind integration is made for your Nothing Phone (3a) Lite, powered by the smarter, effortless Nothing OS.

Glyph Light

The Glyph Light

Cut down your screen time. The Glyph Light keeps you in touch with what matters to you, in a way that works for you.

The Glyph Light - Cut down your screen time. The Glyph Light keeps you in touch with what matters to you, in a way that works for you.

Glyph Light countdown

The Glyph Light will count down when you're taking pictures on a timer.

Glyph Light countdown - The Glyph Light will count down when you're taking pictures on a timer.

Glyph custom notifications

Assign custom light patterns for different contacts and calls.

Glyph custom notifications - Assign custom light patterns for different contacts and calls.

Glyph personal notifications

A light will flash until you acknowledge notifications from people who are important. The unmissable is now unmissable.

Glyph personal notifications - A light will flash until you acknowledge notifications from people who are important. The unmissable is now unmissable.

Essential notifications

Your Glyph Light will keep flashing until you acknowledge message notifications containing select key words, or from certain contacts or apps that you choose.

Essential notifications - Your Glyph Light will keep flashing until you acknowledge message notifications containing select key words, or from certain contacts or apps that you choose.

AMOLED Display

Pixels packed with colour

The new 6.77” AMOLED display lights up your day with over one billion colours. Your specs: - 3,000 nits peak brightness - 120Hz adaptive refresh rate - HDR10+ - 2160 Hz PWM eye-friendly

Pixels packed with colour - The new 6.77” AMOLED display lights up your day with over one billion colours. Your specs: - 3,000 nits peak brightness - 120Hz adaptive refresh rate - HDR

Performance

Powered up processing

Photo editing, gaming and processing just got faster, driven by a more powerful processor. The specs: - TSMC 2nd Gen 4nm process - 8-core up to 2.5 GHz - Up to 16GB RAM Booster AnTuTu score: 711,907

Powered up processing - Photo editing, gaming and processing just got faster, driven by a more powerful processor. The specs: - TSMC 2nd Gen 4nm process - 8-core up to 2.5 GHz - U

Play all day

Get up to 22 hours of YouTube playback, 16 hours of mixed use, and fast charging to 50% in just 20 minutes. Battery specs: - 5,000 mAh battery - 33W Fast Charge

Play all day - Get up to 22 hours of YouTube playback, 16 hours of mixed use, and fast charging to 50% in just 20 minutes. Battery specs: - 5,000 mAh battery - 33W Fast Ch

Build

95,000 tests were just enough

Iron ball impact test To test battery safety, we drop a 500g iron ball onto the phone's back battery panel from a height of one metre. Bending strength test To test for sturdiness, we apply a 600 N force to the middle of the phone to stress test the structure. IP rating dust and water test We spray dust and water onto the phone from all angles to achieve an IP54 rating for dust and water resistance. Fluid immersion test Phone (3a) Lite is submerged in 25 cm of water for 20 minutes. Button press test Each button us pressed 250,000 times. Never a single press less.

95,000 tests were just enough - Iron ball impact test To test battery safety, we drop a 500g iron ball onto the phone's back battery panel from a height of one metre. Bending strength test

Phone ( 3a ) Lite

Triple camera system

Flipkart

1. Appearance disclaimer: The smartphone's appearance showcased on the page is for reference purposes only. Colours and finishes may slightly vary in different environments.

2. Illustrative feature images: Creative feature images displayed on the page are purely illustrative and do not represent the actual device structure; they are intended for demonstration purposes.

3. Charging and battery data source: All data regarding charging and battery life on this page are sourced from Nothing testing laboratories. Actual results may vary due to differences in software versions, environments, and phone models and may not exactly reflect the performance of the actual product.

4. Charge time varies with device settings and environmental factors. Actual results will vary.

5. Water and dust resistance certification: The device is certified IP54 for resistance to splash, water, and dust under specific laboratory conditions. However, this water resistance is applicable only in controlled environments and may not correspond to typical consumer use. Ingress protection is not guaranteed outside test conditions. Testing by users is not recommended, and the product is not advised for beach or pool use. Ingress protection may degrade due to daily wear, physical damage, or disassembly required for repair. Charging, operating physical buttons, or removing the sim tray in moist conditions is discouraged. Liquid damage in environments beyond IP54 conditions is not covered by the warranty.

6. Memory and storage variation clarification: Actual available memory and storage capacity may vary or be reduced due to factors such as the operating system occupying part of the memory (RAM) and pre-installed programs using part of the flash memory (ROM).

7. RAM and ROM relationship clarification: The 16 GB RAM specification is based on the 8 GB RAM version. Creating additional RAM will utilise a selected amount of ROM storage on the device. Memory extension is possible when sufficient storage space is available, and the extension capacity varies across different models.

8. 5G and NFC variation notice: 5G functionality requires support from local telecom operator services and may not be available in all regions. NFC functions may vary in some markets.
